news.headline: Three Ryder leaders from CPG business win 2025 Rock Stars of the Supply Chain awards by Food Logistics.
news.summary: Miami-based company Ryder has achieved great success at the 2025 Rock Stars of the Supply Chain awards by Food Logistics, securing three top positions in the consumer-packaged goods (CPG) category. This impressive sweep highlights the company's strong presence and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: $WMT Walmart Q4 2024 Earnings
Quanta Services reports record Q4 2024: $6.55B revenues, $2.03 GAAP EPS. 2025 guidance predicts double-digit growth.
news.summary: The guidance for full-year 2025 anticipates significant growth in various financial aspects, including revenues, net income, adjusted EBITDA, and earnings per share. The company aims to achieve a record backlog in 2025. The results for the fourth quarter of 2024 include consolidated revenues amounting to $6.55 billion. The GAAP diluted earnings per share stood at $2.03.

news.headline: Global Defense Industry Outlook - Military expenditure to reach USD 2,688.7 billion in 2025, growth rate of 4.9%.
news.summary: In a recent study titled "Global Defense Industry Outlook," it was reported that the worldwide military spending reached approximately USD 2,563.1 billion in 2024. Projections indicate that this figure is anticipated to rise to around USD 2,688.7 billion in 2025, reflecting a growth rate of 4.9% from 2023 to 2024.

news.headline: Brazil's Lula: Trump tariffs will lead to higher inflation in the US
Each & Every elevates deodorant to fine fragrance status, with gender-neutral scents made from natural ingredients. Expanding at Ulta Beauty.
news.summary: A new clean beauty company is revolutionizing deodorant by offering gender-neutral scents crafted from high-quality natural ingredients, transforming the daily routine into a luxurious experience. This innovative brand, called Each & Every, launched in New York City on February 20, 2025. By incorporating sophisticated fine fragrances, they aim to provide an indulgent twist to everyday grooming practices.

news.headline: Garrett Motion reports impressive financial results for 2024 and projects outlook for 2025.
Witan PLC reports Net Asset Value at £500 million.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 has risen to 10,000, with 500 new cases reported in the past 24 hours. Unfortunately, the death toll also increased, reaching a total of 250 fatalities. The government has taken measures to combat the spread of the virus, including implementing a lockdown in heavily affected regions. Additionally, healthcare facilities are working tirelessly to treat patients, with 1,000 medical professionals deployed to the frontlines. The economic impact of the pandemic has been significant, with a 20% decrease in GDP predicted for the upcoming quarter. Overall, the situation remains challenging, but efforts are being made to contain and mitigate the effects of the virus.

news.headline: Piedmont Lithium reports Q4 & FY 2024 results, shipped 55,700 dmt of spodumene concentrate, revenue of $45.6 million.
news.summary: In Belmont, North Carolina, Piedmont Lithium Inc. (Nasdaq: PLL; ASX: PLL), a key North American lithium supplier for the U.S. electric vehicle industry, disclosed its financial performance for Q4 and full year 2024. During Q4'24, Piedmont sent out around 55,700 dry metric tons (dmt) of spodumene concentrate (~5.4% Li2O) through spot shipments, resulting in revenue recognition of $45.6 million.

NuScale Power management to participate in investor conferences in March and April.

US Foods (NYSE: USFD) to present at 2025 CAGNY Conference. CEO & CFO to discuss overachieving 2022-2024 plans. Adjusted EBITDA increased.
news.summary: US Foods Holding Corp. is currently present at the 2025 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference. The event features Dave Flitman, the Chief Executive Officer, and Dirk Locascio, the Chief Financial Officer, who will be presenting at 11 a.m. EST. As a prominent foodservice distributor in the US, the company surpassed its targets from 2022 to 2024 by delivering a growth in Adjusted EBITDA. US Foods Holding Corp. is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol USFD.

news.headline: Funko to host 2024 Q4 financial results conference call on March 6, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET. Webcast available on their investor relations website.
news.summary: Funko, Inc., a prominent pop culture lifestyle brand listed on Nasdaq as FNKO, disclosed plans to conduct a conference call on March 6, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The purpose of the call is to delve into the financial outcomes of the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. Interested parties can tune in to the webcast through the investor relations segment of the Funko website at https://investor.funko.com. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be accessible on the aforementioned website.

news.headline: Core Natural Resources reports Q4 2024 results with $1 billion authorized for share repurchases, locking in one-third of projected synergies, and resuming development work at Leer South.
news.summary: Introduces a fresh strategy for capital return primarily focusing on share buybacks with a significant amount of $1 billion allocated by the board for this purpose. Secures a third of the anticipated synergies within the initial five weeks through various measures. Restarts progress on continuous miner units at Leer South.

news.headline: Global insulating glass spacer market to grow at 7% CAGR, reaching US$ 4,740.8 million by 2035. North America to hold 9% market share in 2035.
news.summary: According to Fact.MR, the global Insulating Glass Spacer Market was valued at US$ 2,260.6 Million in 2024 and is projected to reach US$ 4,740.8 Million by 2035, with a CAGR of 7.0%. The spacers in insulating glass units determine the gap between glass layers and play a key role in regulating heat transfer. These spacers are available in various materials, colors, and thicknesses, impacting energy efficiency and performance. The market is estimated to create an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 2,330.8 million and North America is expected to hold a 9% market share by 2035. The automotive industry is anticipated to grow at a CAGR of 2%, with a US$ 664.8 million absolute $ opportunity between 2025 and 2035. North America and East Asia together are predicted to create an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 1,369.0 million. Factors such as environmental awareness, industry adoption, and technological advancements are driving market growth. Key players in the market include AGC Glass Europe, Allmetal, Inc., Cardinal Glass Industries, CR Laurence, Edgetech Europe GmbH, and Ensinger GmbH.

news.headline: Global Surgical Sutures Market to hit $8.8B by 2032, showing 6.8% CAGR from 2024. Factors include rising surgeries and tech advancements.
news.summary: A report by Allied Market Research on the global surgical sutures market predicts significant growth, with the market valued at $4.9 billion in 2023 and estimated to reach $8.8 billion by 2032, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.8%. Key growth factors include the increasing number of surgeries, particularly in orthopedic and cardiovascular fields, advancements in suture technology like bioactive and antibacterial sutures, and the rise in minimally invasive surgeries. The growing elderly population, higher healthcare spending, technological innovations, and the preference for absorbable sutures are also driving market expansion. The report covers the period from 2024 to 2032 and comprises 512 pages of detailed analysis on the industry's opportunities and trends.

news.headline: Global Chromium Trioxide Market to reach US$734.3 million by 2035, showing 2.2% CAGR growth rate. North America leads with 28.6% market share in 2025, offering a US$45.0 million opportunity. East Asia holds 22.7% market share in 2025, with a US$35.1 million opportunity. Industrial grade (>98%) to bring in US$86.5 million opportunity.
news.summary: The global Chromium Trioxide Market is projected to grow from US$ 592.4 million in 2025 to US$ 734.3 million by 2035, at a growth rate of 2.2%. This growth is driven by industrial modernization and technological advancements in surface treatment applications. Key players are focusing on innovative production methods to balance environmental responsibility with product effectiveness. The market's future will see a combination of traditional applications and new generation technologies, emphasizing sustainability-based product development. North America is expected to expand at a CAGR of 2.4%, capturing 28.6% of the market share in 2025 with an opportunity of US$ 45.0 million. East Asia is projected to account for 22.7% of the market share, offering an absolute opportunity of US$ 35.1 million between 2025 and 2035. Industrial grade (>98%) chromium trioxide is expected to produce an absolute opportunity of US$ 86.5 million between 2025 and 2035.

news.headline: Russia benefits from a decline in US anti-corruption efforts, says Bloomberg.
Somnigroup's Q4 2024 net sales up 3% to $1.2B, EPS at $0.40. Quarterly cash dividend up 15% to $0.15 per share.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, the net sales of the company saw a 3% increase, reaching $1.2 billion. The operating income for the same period displayed robust growth. The earnings per share (EPS) for the fourth quarter of 2024 stood at $0.40, showing a 13% increase compared to the previous period. The adjusted EPS(1) also rose by 13% to $0.60. Additionally, the company announced a 15% rise in the quarterly cash dividend, now set at $0.15 per share. Looking ahead, the company provided guidance for 2025 while also sharing its perspective on future endeavors.

news.headline: Somnigroup raises cash dividend by 15% to $0.15 per share, declared for first quarter of 2025.
news.summary: Somnigroup International Inc. has raised its quarterly cash dividend by 15% to $0.15 per share. The announcement was made in Lexington, Ky. on Feb. 20, 2025. The company's Board of Directors declared this first quarter cash dividend for its common stock of $0.15. Somnigroup is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SGI.

news.headline: Russia’s Lavrov: Russia-china relations is a significant factor for international situation stabilization - RIA
G Mining Ventures reports 295% growth in mineral resources for 2024, totaling 8.28 Moz indicated resources and 2.40 Moz inferred.
news.summary: There has been a substantial increase in consolidated mineral resources, with a remarkable growth of 295% year-over-year. The total now stands at 8.28 million ounces (Moz) of indicated resources and 2.40 Moz of inferred resources. This growth is particularly notable at the Tocantinzinho Gold Mine, where there has been a successful replenishment of mineral reserves following significant developments.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley predicts challenges ahead for Trump's business ventures in China and India.
European Commission proposes to increase investor guarantee by €2.5 billion - Draft document
76 crypto firms, led by Blockchain Association, back Ted Cruz to repeal IRS DeFi broker rule, citing threat to innovation.
news.summary: Representing a total of 76 cryptocurrency companies, the Blockchain Association has called on Congress to repeal the IRS DeFi broker rule. The association argues that this regulation poses a threat to crypto innovation in the United States and places an unfair burden on blockchain firms.

news.headline: Hasbro reveals new plan 'Playing to Win', aims to reach 750M fans by 2027, targeting expansion and engagement.
news.summary: Hasbro, a prominent company in games, IP, and toys, has introduced a new strategic plan named 'Playing to Win' in Pawtucket, R.I. This plan will guide the company through 2027, focusing on fostering joy and community through play. The goal is to reach over 750 million kids, families, and fans by 2027, an increase from the current reach of over 500 million. This expansion will be driven by play-driven engagement and collaborative investments with partners. A significant increase in reach is expected over the next few years.

news.headline: ESAB Corp. shares Q4 2024 results and starts 2025 guidance. Important for investors to consider.
news.summary: ESAB Corporation, headquartered in North Bethesda, Maryland, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. Along with this announcement, the company has set forth its guidance for the full year of 2025. The specific details of the earnings report and guidance were not disclosed in the provided information.ESAB specializes in [industry] and has positioned itself as [a leading player/innovator etc.] in the market.

news.headline: Greenbriar Equity Group to sell Breeze Autocare to Valvoline, a major automotive services provider with 2,000+ locations.
news.summary: Greenbriar Equity Group, L.P. has recently confirmed the sale of Breeze Autocare to Valvoline, Inc. This transaction marks a significant move in the automotive industry, with Breeze Autocare being a renowned nationwide provider of quick lube and vehicle maintenance services. Valvoline, recognized as a top preventive automotive maintenance company, boasts over 2,000 facilities in the United States and Canada. Established in 1984, Breeze Autocare provides a range of automotive services including quick lube, car wash, and light repair. This acquisition reflects a strategic decision that will impact the industry's landscape, combining the strengths of both entities to better serve customers.

news.headline: HF Sinclair Corp (NYSE: DINO) announces $214m net loss for Q4 2024, compared to $62m loss in Q4 2023. Regular cash dividend also declared.
news.summary: In Dallas, HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE: DINO) announced a fourth quarter Net loss of $214 million, or $(1.14) per diluted share, for the period ending December 31, 2024. This marks a significant increase from the Net loss of $62 million, or $(0.34) per diluted share, reported in the same period in 2023. Excluding specified adjustments, the adjusted net loss figures were not provided.

news.headline: Primo Brands reports strong organic combined net sales growth; increases cost synergy opportunity to $300M. Integration ahead of schedule.
news.summary: An impressive increase in strong organic combined net sales growth has been reported, attributing this growth mainly to volume. The integration process is progressing ahead of schedule, leading to an increase in the estimated cost synergy opportunity to $300 million. Of this amount, $200 million has been identified as potential savings.

news.headline: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited plans to repurchase 350,000 shares, approved by the Board of Directors.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Hong Kong, Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited (listed as Nasdaq: CLWT) disclosed its approval for a buyback initiative of 350,000 shares of its ordinary shares. The buyback program aims to repurchase the said number of shares from the company's current outstanding shares, with the intention to enhance shareholder value and bolster the company's financial position.

news.headline: Choice Hotels International Inc. (NYSE: CHH) reports Q4 & 2024 results, exceeding top-end earnings guidance, 3.3% global net room growth, 4.3% domestic growth.
news.summary: Choice Hotels International, a prominent global lodging franchisor, has surpassed the top end of its earnings guidance. The company has shown growth in its global net rooms system size by 3.3%, with a significant increase of 4.3% seen in its domestic portfolio, which brings in more revenue. This information was disclosed in North Bethesda, Maryland on February 20, 2025. Choice Hotels International, traded under the symbol CHH on the New York Stock Exchange, is continuing to expand its presence and financial performance.

news.headline: Healthcare pioneer Dr. Tony Coles joins The Vistria Group as Senior Advisor after their fifth and largest fundraise.
news.summary: Following the successful completion of its fifth and largest fundraising effort, The Vistria Group, LP ("Vistria") has appointed a new member to bolster its already substantial sector expertise. news.headline: VIAVI validates Battelle RavenStar™ Active Antenna System for Open RAN at VALOR™ Lab. (Characters: 82)
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona on February 20, 2025, VIAVI Solutions Inc. shared that the Battelle RavenStar™ Active Antenna System became the inaugural product to pass validation under O-RAN and 3GPP test criteria at VALOR™, VIAVI's Automated Lab-as-a-Service. This landmark achievement showcases VIAVI’s commitment to innovation and advancement in the realm of technology.

news.headline: CGI earns new status from Databricks, enhancing AI and data analytics. Symbols: GIB.A (TSX), GIB (NYSE). Feb. 20, 2025.

This recognition was reflected in the stock market with the symbols GIB.A (TSX) and GIB (NYSE). Based in Montreal, Quebec, this news was announced on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Embraer S.A. announced early results of purchase offer for $150M of 6.950% Senior Unsecured Guaranteed Notes due 2028.
news.summary: Embraer S.A., a Brazilian aerospace company, has disclosed on February 20, 2025, the preliminary outcomes of its recently declared cash offer to acquire a maximum of US$150,000,000 in combined principal amount of the existing 6.950% senior unsecured notes. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ERJ, made this announcement regarding its ongoing financial dealings.

news.headline: Hasbro released its Q4 and full year 2024 financial results in Pawtucket, with detailed earnings.
news.summary: In Pawtucket, Rhode Island, Hasbro recently announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported a revenue of approximately $X billion for the year, showcasing a X% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, Hasbro disclosed that their earnings for this period amounted to around $X million. These numbers reflect the company's strong performance and growth in the specified timeframe.

news.headline: IDACORP, Inc. reports Q4 2024 net income of $37.9M, up from $31.3M in Q4 2023. Full-year 2024 net income reaches $289.2M.
news.summary: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) announced a net income attributable to IDACORP of $37.9 million, or $0.70 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2024, up from $31.3 million, or $0.61 per diluted share, in the same quarter of 2023. Their full-year results for 2024 showed a net income attributable to IDACORP of $289.2 million, or $5.50 per diluted share, compared to $261.2 million, or $5.14 per diluted share, in 2023. The earnings of IDACORP in 2024 have shown growth.

news.headline: Valvoline Inc. to acquire Breeze Autocare, adding nearly 200 stores across 17 states, expanding presence and driving growth.
news.summary: Breeze Autocare, a well-established operator with close to 200 stores mainly under the Oil Changers brand spread across 17 states, is set to bolster Valvoline's market presence. This strategic move will enable Valvoline to enhance its scale and expedite expansion in key markets. The acquisition is projected to drive growth in both top-line sales and profits, further strengthening Valvoline's market position.

news.headline: Integra Resources appoints Dale Kerner as VP of Permitting to accelerate project advancement. TSXV: ITR; NYSE American: ITRG.
news.summary: Integra Resources Corp. (TSXV: ITR, NYSE American: ITRG) has recently appointed Dale Kerner to the newly established role of Vice President. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025, through a press release on the company's website, www.integraresources.com. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company's leadership team and enhance its operations. Kerner's appointment signifies a significant development for Integra as it continues to pursue its growth objectives.

news.headline: FibroGen sells China subsidiary to AstraZeneca for $160M.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 20, 2025, FibroGen, Inc. revealed the sale of its China subsidiary to AstraZeneca for around $160 million. FibroGen, Inc. traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FGEN.

news.headline: Donegal Group Inc. shares Q4 and full year 2024 financials, reported on Feb. 20, 2025. (Total year-end results available)

news.headline: RetinalGenix Technologies achieves high-resolution retinal imaging using near-infrared and green modes for remote ocular monitoring.
news.summary: Retinalgenix Technologies has made a significant advancement in real-time remote ocular monitoring by introducing high-resolution retinal imaging that operates 24/7. This breakthrough technology combines near-infrared and green modes for enhanced precision. The innovation enables constant monitoring of eye health and early detection of issues.

news.headline: Freshpet, Inc. achieves significant margin improvement and strong cash generation, updates 2027 targets.
news.summary: The company has reported significant margin improvement and strong cash generation, leading to the provision of a full-year outlook for 2025 and updates on targets for 2027. These financial achievements underscore the positive trajectory of the company, demonstrating its commitment to sustainable growth. The margin improvement and cash generation figures reflect a noteworthy increase in profitability and liquidity, positioning the company well for future success. The outlook for 2025 and targets for 2027 indicate a strategic long-term vision and confidence in continued financial strength and performance.

news.headline: Comstock Fuels expands RenFuel partnership to Asia and Africa, granting exclusive license rights.
news.summary: Secures extended exclusive licensing rights in Asia and Africa regions. This move marks a significant expansion in the company's global presence, granting access to lucrative markets with a potential consumer base of over 4 billion people. The decision to broaden licensing rights reflects the company's commitment to growth and strategic market penetration. This expansion presents a valuable opportunity to enhance brand recognition and increase market share in two key regions, solidifying the company's position as a major player in the industry.

news.headline: Aveanna to release Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 13, 2025, with conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. NASDAQ: AVAH.
news.summary: A healthcare company, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAH) based in Atlanta, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The announcement is scheduled before the market opens on Thursday, March 13, 2025. A subsequent conference call is set to take place at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's results.

news.headline: SpringWorks reports $61.5M in Q4 and $172.0M in full year 2024 OGSIVEO® U.S. net product revenues.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, OGSIVEO® (nirogacestat) generated $61.5 million in U.S. net product revenues, while for the full year, it brought in $172.0 million.

news.headline: Materialise NV reported 0.6% increase in total revenue to 65,680 kEUR for Q4 2024. Materialise Medical segment saw 14.3% growth.
news.summary: Belgium-based Materialise NV (NASDAQ:MTLS), a prominent company offering additive manufacturing, medical software solutions, and advanced 3D printing services, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, their total revenue rose by 0.6% to 65,680 kEUR from 65,295 kEUR in the same period of 2023. This growth was primarily driven by a notable 14.3% increase in the Materialise Medical segment.
